title: Large-scale structured extraction pass (funded)
context: After the corpus pipeline is mature (M1/M2 complete), a structured extraction pass using an LLM can enrich full-text articles (where CC licenses permit derivative processing) with structured fields: entities, relationships, outcome data, trial registrations, and statistical summaries. This is funded-lane work: it runs via packages/runner against donor API credits with a hard per-task budget cap, never exceeding the declared fundedBudgetUsd. Extraction is only performed on articles with permitsDerivatives:true; ND-licensed articles are excluded from derivative extraction. All extraction outputs carry provenance and are gate-reviewed before release.
objective: Run a large-scale structured extraction pass over CC-BY/CC-BY-SA full-text articles in the M1/M2 corpus using packages/runner (funded lane, metered API execution), producing structured metadata fields (entities, relationships, statistical summaries) within the declared budget cap, with provenance on every extracted field.
acceptanceCriteria: Extraction is performed only on articles with license.permitsDerivatives:true; CC-BY-ND and CC-BY-NC-ND articles are explicitly excluded from derivative extraction.
All extracted fields carry provenance: article PMCID, extraction model version, extraction date, and the source passage from which the field was derived.
Total compute cost stays within the declared fundedBudgetUsd hard cap; packages/runner enforces the cap and the run aborts if the cap is reached.
No API keys or secrets are committed; the funded-lane runner supplies credentials at runtime.
Extracted outputs pass a spot-audit (≥ 50 records reviewed for accuracy and hallucination rate); results are recorded.
Extraction results are committed as supplementary metadata (not replacing canonical record fields); gate-002 and patient-008 are re-verified to confirm no new leakage from extracted content.
resources: pmc-cancer-fullbuild-010 (M1 corpus — source of full-text articles for extraction)
pmc-cancer-model-001 (canonical record — provenance fields for extracted data)
output: A supplementary structured-extraction dataset: per-article extracted fields (entities, relationships, statistical summaries) with full provenance, committed as an extension of the M2 corpus manifest, with spot-audit results and cost receipts recorded.
